root.text:
DAPA-HF (2019)\N
⭐ iSGLT2 en IC
independiente de diabetes\N
Dapagliflozina en ICFEr

children.text: Sobre terapia óptima:\n96% IECA/ARA2/ARNI\n96% BB, 71% ARM

Outcome primario ⭐
Muerte CV + Hosp IC
HR 0.74 (0.65-0.85) p menor 0.001
NNT = 21
Subgrupo sin DM ⭐\nBeneficio IGUAL que con DM\nHR 0.73 (0.60-0.88)
Depleción volumen: 7.5% vs 6.8%\nInfecciones genitales: 0.9% vs 0.4%\nCetoacidosis: muy rara

Ventajas ancianos:
• Una vez al día
• Sin hipotensión significativa
• Protección renal
3. Cuarto pilar ICFEr\nARNI + BB + ARM + iSGLT2
1. McMurray JJV, Solomon SD, Inzucchi SE, et al. Dapagliflozin in Patients with Heart Failure and Reduced Ejection Fraction (DAPA-HF). N Engl J Med. 2019;381(21):1995-2008.

2. Petrie MC, Verma S, Docherty KF, et al. Effect of Dapagliflozin on Worsening Heart Failure and Cardiovascular Death in Patients With Heart Failure With and Without Diabetes. JAMA. 2020;323(14):1353-1368.
3. Heidenreich PA, Bozkurt B, Aguilar D, et al. 2022 AHA/ACC/HFSA Guideline for the Management of Heart Failure. Circulation. 2022;145(18):e895-e1032.
4. McDonagh TA, Metra M, Adamo M, et al. 2021 ESC Guidelines for the diagnosis and treatment of acute and chronic heart failure. Eur Heart J. 2021;42(36):3599-3726.
5. Martinez FA, Serenelli M, Nicolau JC, et al. Efficacy and Safety of Dapagliflozin in Heart Failure With Reduced Ejection Fraction According to Age. Circulation. 2020;141(2):100-111.
6. Solomon SD, McMurray JJV, Claggett B, et al. Dapagliflozin in Heart Failure with Mildly Reduced or Preserved Ejection Fraction (DELIVER). N Engl J Med. 2022;387(12):1089-1098.
